overall.description: A nighttime drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city inspired by Tokyo, featuring dense neon signage, towering digital billboards, and a mix of traditional Japanese and ultra-modern architecture. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows smooth vehicle-mounted camera movement through illuminated downtown streets.

illuminated triangular caution signs mounted on the right wall
traditional wooden pagoda-style structure with curved roof among modern buildings
tall cylindrical building covered in digital advertising screens visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway overpass with red warning signs on the right. The vehicle turns right onto a main avenue, transitioning from the sheltered underpass to an open neon-lit street where a traditional Japanese pagoda building stands out among futuristic glass towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial avenue with massive digital advertising displays

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily down the avenue past illuminated billboards and glass office buildings

entered.detail: tall building facades covered in bright animated advertisements and neon signage
high-rise towers with reflective glass surfaces and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Driving down a wide commercial avenue lined with massive digital billboards on the right and modern glass towers on the left. The cylindrical digital tower looms larger ahead as the vehicle moves forward, surrounded by the glow of neon advertisements and street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon approaching cylindrical landmark tower

agents.ego_description: continuing down the avenue as the cylindrical tower dominates the left side of the view

street-level commercial entrances with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the distinctive cylindrical digital tower, which now fills the left side of the frame with its wraparound advertising screens. The street continues straight with changing digital billboards on the right and an elevated pedestrian bridge visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection near cylindrical tower

events.description: approaching slower traffic and intersection crosswalk with vehicles waiting ahead

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly while approaching the intersection with cross traffic and pedestrians visible on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead stopped or slowing at the intersection traffic light

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings on the road surface approaching the intersection
illuminated traffic signals hanging over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Passing the cylindrical tower, the vehicle approaches a busy intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic lights. Other vehicles are visible ahead waiting at the light, while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. The dense urban environment continues with commercial buildings lining both sides of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle-mounted camera as it moves from a sheltered industrial underpass into the heart of a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway overpass marked by red warning signs, turning right to emerge from the shadows into an open street where a traditional Japanese pagoda contrasts with surrounding glass towers. As the vehicle accelerates down the wide avenue, the environment expands into a corridor of massive digital billboards and modern skyscrapers, with a towering cylindrical digital structure gradually looming larger in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera passes directly beside the cylindrical tower's wraparound screens, moving toward an elevated pedestrian bridge under the glow of shifting advertisements. Finally, the movement leads into a busy urban intersection, passing through crosswalks and traffic lights amidst a dense crowd of pedestrians and idling vehicles.
